blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-239 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python and Python-adjacent auxiliary inventory and hardens the Go-only state around hidden control paths and nested evidence directories.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `6acdc7c9`.
Final pushed head is `a827c128 BIG-GO-239: add validation and status artifacts`, published to `origin/BIG-GO-239` at `a827c1287471a158e1ae13bdd8709f76dbdc1981`.
Repeated push attempts to `origin/main` were rejected after the remote advanced, so the completed lane was pushed to its issue branch instead.
